title: Resources related to the Chemicals Management Plan - Canada.ca
content:
## Resources related to the Chemicals Management Plan
Get quick, easy access to Chemicals Management Plan resources by using this A-to-Z index. Search for chemicals or micro-organisms by name, CAS RN or accession number using the search engine .
